title: Warring States - Sengoku Jidai
description: Centered around the mod "Sengoku Jidai" made by QwikSand with the intent of uplifting it even further.
body:
The current goal of this pack is for a quick out-of-the-box experience centered on QwikSand's "_Sengoku Jidai"_ mod based on the an era of the same name of Japanese history during a series of civil wars and turmoil. 
- I recommend checking out his trailer! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BheMX3ATWaU

I do plan on updating over time with mods that *shouldn't* break immersion. That being said, eventually I do wish to take inspiration from Ghost of Tsushima with the combat.

**Server is up!** Here's the Discord: https://discord.gg/BBMNjUXqeb
- World not guarenteed to last; but I will try.
- Can go down at any point without warning, for an indefinite amount of time. But it should be stable.

Join the Discord though the link if you have any feedback or want to hang out!

**I do not take credit for any mod, shaderpack, or texturepack featured in this modpack (unless explicitly stated). Please support the official creators!**

**Notes**
- works at 4096MB's of RAM. Recommended is 8192MB's for Distant Horizons. 
- If using shaders, I recommend using the "BSL" profile already in the pack. 
- "Euphoria Patches" is setup as well, but before using I recommend disabling the "Nuit" and "Nuit Interop" mods, otherwise The Sun will be a tad glitched.
